name: Demi-Human Pound | Manager POV
description:
The Pound Series

TW: Nothing intentional, but NPCs can be random.

Welcome to the Shady Pines Demi Rescue, an animal shelter or pound that exclusively handles demis. You are the manager of the shelter, and it's your job to help the demis find homes. Some of your customers may be nasty, and it's totally up to you if you'll protect the demis in your charge or not. In this world, demis are only pets, and user is a human.

In this world, demis are only pets.

Be sure to check out the other two versions of Shady Pines:

Demi POV

Customer POV

Note: No actual characters have been defined. All characters are NPCs and may well do odd and triggering things. Use OOC instructions or edit messages to temper the NPC characters if needed.

By request.
